member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId
member.summary: An OWID whose payload encodes the three fields of a 51Did: a 1-byte flags bitmask (usage tier and identifier type), a 4-byte little-endian License Id, and the identifier value.

remarks.para: Terminology. The 51Did itself (this OWID envelope) is the identifier. The 32-byte SHA-256 hash inside the payload is the probabilistic value carried by that identifier; two responses for the same device + IP + usage share the same probabilistic value but differ at the byte level because the envelope embeds a fresh date and signature on each call. Compare probabilistic values, never full identifiers.
Payload layout. The header (offsets 0-4) is shared by every identifier type; bits 6-7 of Flags select the type and the length of the value that follows:
Inherits so callers can use OWID-level features (signature verification, base64 round-tripping) directly on a instance.
This class does NOT verify the OWID signature on construction. Callers wanting cryptographic verification should call the extension methods on on this instance after construction.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.FlagsOffset
member.summary: Byte offset of the Flags field within the payload.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.LicenseIdOffset
member.summary: Byte offset of the License Id field within the payload.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.LicenseIdLength
member.summary: Byte length of the License Id field.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.HashOffset
member.summary: Byte offset of the Hash field within the payload.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.HashLength
member.summary: Byte length of the Hash field (SHA-256).

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.HeaderLength
member.summary: Byte length of the payload header (Flags + LicenseId) that is common to every identifier type.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.GuidLength
member.summary: Byte length of the GUID value carried by Random identifiers.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.RandomPayloadLength
member.summary: Minimum byte length of a Random 51Did payload (Flags + LicenseId + GUID).

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.PayloadLength
member.summary: Minimum byte length of a Probabilistic or HashedEmail 51Did payload (Flags + LicenseId + Hash). Random payloads are shorter — see .

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.Flags
member.summary: The 1-byte usage flags bit-mask from the payload.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.Type
member.summary: The identifier type carried in bits 6-7 of .

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.LicenseId
member.summary: The 4-byte little-endian License Id from the payload.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.Hash
member.summary: The value bytes from the payload: a 32-byte SHA-256 for Probabilistic and HashedEmail identifiers, 16 GUID bytes for Random ones. This is the stable field for comparing two 51Did identifiers: two identifiers for the same device + IP + usage share the same probabilistic value even though their wrapping envelopes (date, signature) differ on every issue. Treat as the cache / dedup key. SHA-256 is the underlying hash function; the property is named Hash to reflect that implementation detail.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a 51Did from its base64-encoded OWID string.
member.param: Base64 of the full OWID envelope (version + domain + date + length-prefixed payload + 64-byte signature) as produced by the 51Degrees cloud service.
member.exception: Thrown by the underlying OWID parser when is not valid Base64.
Thrown when the decoded payload is shorter than the minimum for its identifier type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Parse a 51Did from the raw bytes of an OWID envelope.
member.exception: Thrown when the payload is shorter than the minimum for its identifier type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.Model.FodId.#ctor(Owid.Client.Model.Owid)
member.summary: Promote an already-parsed OWID into a 51Did by unpacking its payload fields. The OWID's Version, Domain, Date, Payload and Signature are copied by reference onto the new instance.
member.exception: Thrown when 's payload is shorter than the minimum for its identifier type.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Model.IdType
member.summary: The identifier type carried in bits 6-7 of the 51Did flags byte. Existing identifiers were issued with these bits zeroed, so they decode as .

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.IdType.Probabilistic
member.summary: Derived from the device fingerprint and IP address. Payload carries a 32-byte SHA-256 value.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.IdType.Random
member.summary: A server-generated random GUID. Payload carries 16 GUID bytes.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.IdType.HashedEmail
member.summary: Derived from the caller-supplied email and salt. Payload carries a 32-byte SHA-256 value.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Did.Model.IdType.Reserved
member.summary: Not yet assigned. Parsed best-effort: the header fields are unpacked and the remaining payload bytes are exposed as-is.

member.name: F:Owid.Client.Constants.BaseDate
member.summary: The base data for OWIDs. The date and time information is stored in hours or minutes after this date.

member.name: F:Owid.Client.Constants.SignatureLength
member.summary: The length of an OWID signature in bytes.

member.name: F:Owid.Client.Constants.Empty
member.summary: Used when cryptographic operations are required where there is no other data to be considered.

member.name: T:Owid.Client.Creator
member.summary: Needed to create new OWIDs.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Creator.Domain
member.summary: Domain associated with the OWID creator. Contains well known end points to provide public keys and other information needed to conform to the OWID specification.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Creator.Crypto
member.summary: Used to sign OWIDs from this creator.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.#ctor(Owid.Client.Model.Configuration.OwidConfiguration)
member.summary: Make new from config.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.#ctor(System.String,System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa)
member.summary: Make new .

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.Sign(Owid.Client.Model.Owid)
member.summary: Sign the OWID provided.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.Sign(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Sign the OWID provided AND the other OWIDs provided.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.SignWithOthers(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Sign the OWID provided AND the other OWIDs provided.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.Sign(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new OWID for the creator containing the value as the payload.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Creator.Sign(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a new OWID for the creator containing the value as the payload.

member.name: T:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions
member.summary: Extensions methods for crypto operations on instances.

member.name: F:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions._handler
member.summary: Handlers used with HTTP clients to automatically decompress any compressed data streams.

member.name: F:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions._publicKeyCache
member.summary: Cache used to avoid repeat requests for the same public keys.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.VerifyAsync(Owid.Client.Model.Owid)
member.summary: Verify that signature is correct.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.VerifyAsync(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa)
member.summary: Verify that signature is correct.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.VerifyAsync(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Verify that signature is correct.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.VerifyAsync(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Verify that signature is correct.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.VerifyAsyncWithOthers(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Verify that signature is correct.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.GetDataForCrypto(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,Owid.Client.Model.Owid[])
member.summary: Adds the fields from this OWID to the byte buffer without the signature. Adds all the bytes of the others to the data.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.GetPublicKey(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the public key for the owid.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.CryptoExtensions.GetPublicKey(System.Uri)
member.summary: Get the public key from the domain contained in the OWID if it is not already contained in the cache.

member.name: T:Owid.Client.Extensions
member.summary: Extensions methods for .

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Extensions.AsByteArray(Owid.Client.Model.Owid)
member.summary: Converts to byte array.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Extensions.AsBase64(Owid.Client.Model.Owid)
member.summary: Converts to Base64-encoded string.

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Extensions.EmptyToBuffer(System.IO.BinaryWriter)
member.summary: Writes empty to .

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Extensions.ToBuffer(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.IO.BinaryWriter)
member.summary: Writes to

member.name: M:Owid.Client.Extensions.FromBuffer(Owid.Client.Model.Owid,System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads data from .

member.name: T:Owid.Client.Model.Configuration.OwidConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for to make new s with.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Configuration.OwidConfiguration.Domain
member.summary: Domain associated with the OWID creator. Contains well known end points to provide public keys and other information needed to conform to the OWID specification.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Configuration.OwidConfiguration.PrivateKey
member.summary: The PEM format private key for the OWID creator.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Configuration.OwidConfiguration.PublicKey
member.summary: The PEM format public key for the OWID creator.

member.name: T:Owid.Client.Model.Owid
member.summary: OWID structure which can be used as a node in a tree.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.Version
member.summary: The byte version of the OWID.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.Domain
member.summary: Domain associated with the creator.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.Date
member.summary: The date and time to the nearest minute in UTC of the creation.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.Payload
member.summary: Array of bytes that form the payload.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.PayloadAsString
member.summary: The payload as a string.

member.name: P:Owid.Client.Model.Owid.Signature
member.summary: Signature for this OWID and it's ancestor. Generated by the instance.
